title: Public family Swim
description: Children under 50 inches or 8 yrs of age must be accompanied by an adult.  Adult must be with child at all times.

title: After school program
description: Looking to give your child structured activity during non-school hours?Our after school programs allow youth to play, learn, and grow.After School Activities may include...Low impact sports in our indoor gym, board games, outdoor play at our outdoor playground areas, arts & crafts, reading, ceramic clay building, citywide art contest, fire drills and fire prevention awareness, field trips to Arden Theatre and to the Venice Island Parks & Rec. Theatre Venue, percussion music, healthy snacks, and homework help.  A 5-page registration form is due with full start-up payment of $250.00  which includes $110 for September and $110 for May and a non-refundable $30 registration fee.  $110 is due on the first Friday of each additional month (October thru April). Cost includes an after school t-shirt and the city snack/meal program.  We accept payment in the form of check or money order, NO cash. Payable to the Northern Liberties Advisory Council.  Additional information, contact the recreation center Monday to Friday from 2 to 8 p.m. or call 215-686-1785 - On half day dismissals, we will pick up the children at Kearny school at 12:30 p.m. vs. 3:39 p.m.  All other schools will need to find other modes of transportation which includes but is not limited to walking, bus, car, etc.  Space is limited, so register early! We follow the academic calendar for the School District of Philadelphia and the City of Philadelphia Holidays.

title: Gap Camp
description: Skills and drills basketball clinic.

title: West african dance
description: West African dance is an essential component of West African culture. Over time, traditional dances incorporated new moves, rhythms and ideas. Through the slave trade, and through national production of traditional dance forms, West African dance has found it's way around the globe. West African Dance has influenced many popular American dance forms, such as hip-hop, salsa and jazz dance. Traditional dances are still practiced by many people today.

title: Swim Team
description: Swim Team for children ages 5-8 for Little Quakers and 9-16 for youth swim team

title: After School Program
description: Tustin After-School Program offers academic and recreational programs for children during non-school hours. Providing our programs in a safe and engaging environment is Tustin After-School Program highest priority. We work within our community to design a program that meets specific needs of our children as well as prepare teens for the summer work-ready programs. We draw upon the most effective academic enrichment, performing arts, physical fitness, nutritional and life skill programs to challenge children and make learning fun. We provide a healthy snack and homework assistance.

title: After school drama intro course
location: Venice Island Performing Arts and Recreation Center
description: This after school program will serve the needs of the neighboring community, by introducing children to different aspects of the world of theater. Topics covered will range from stage direction, movement, usage of equipment and tools, music  to backstage crew roles and responsibilities.

title: Al-bustan seeds of culture
description: Al-Bustan’s Summer Camp offers an immersive, arts- and culture-centered experience for young learners, grades K-12. Campers engage in a wide range of activities, including Arabic language learning, storytelling, Arabic calligraphy, visual arts, music, drumming, and, for the first time ever, swimming!

title: Arts & Crafts
description: Create crafts on Friday nights! All ages Pre-k thru 4th Grader are welcome. Crafts will be decided on a weekly basis, and we participate in select contests with Philadelphia Parks & Recreation Visual Arts. This is a drop-in program - no registration required. Cost is $2 per class
